name: 10-Minute Warmup
description: Progressive movement preparation before speed, strength, or skill work.

name: Hip Activation
description: Controlled hip and trunk activation before acceleration or lateral work.

name: Strength + Speed A
description: Foundation single-leg control paired with short acceleration.

name: Strength + Speed C
description: Short, high-quality speed work connected to game-speed movement.

name: 20-Minute Mobility
description: Easy mobility and range-of-motion work without fatigue.

name: 8-Minute Cooldown
description: Easy movement, breathing, hydration, and session reflection.

name: Head-Up Skill 20
description: Head-up puck touches with scanning and callouts.

name: Deke Skill Block
description: Controlled direction changes and escape decisions.

name: 75-Shot Quality Block
description: Planned quality shots with target intent and repeatable mechanics.

name: Shooting After Fatigue
description: A short shooting block after controlled work to practice composure.

name: Shift Conditioning
description: Short game-like work bouts with complete recovery.

name: Recovery Session
description: Low-intensity movement intended to improve readiness, not create fatigue.
bestUse: After camps, hard ice, or low-readiness days

name: KPI Test Block
description: Standardized attempts with consistent setup and planned limits.

name: Tryout Primer
description: Short, familiar, confidence-focused work that preserves freshness.
bestUse: Final two weeks and day-before-tryout context
